element.name: Mislead
element.supports: Warlock, Rogue, Cleric, Sorcerer, Ranger, Druid

description.p: Turn invisible and a perfect, but silent, illusory-double of you appears elsewhere in the room. You control the actions of this double, but the double cannot interact with objects or creatures. If a creature tries to strike your double and "hits", they are no longer fooled, and your Deception has to beat their Perception to not be found.

element.name: Divination
element.supports: Warlock, Rogue, Cleric, Sorcerer, Ranger, Druid

description.p: Twice per game you can scry either into the past or into the future
